steps.title: Identify the cause-and-effect structure
steps.content: Sentence 2 explains the mechanism: spatulae bond with atoms. Sentence 3 states the result: spiders can cling and climb any surface. The blank must connect these as cause and effect.

steps.title: Match the causal transition
steps.content: As a result, introduces a consequence that follows from the bonding ability. The other three signal examples, contrasts, or parallel ideas instead of consequences. That is the correct answer.
